# SCORE Business Health Check Tool

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Tool for checking the health of an operating business.

## When to surface

The user has an operating business and wants to know what needs improvement.

## Key information

- ## BOSS Library tags
- score, template-or-tool
- ## Resource purpose
- Tool for checking the health of an operating business.
- ## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
- Use when an existing business is stuck, struggling, or needs a broad diagnostic before deeper triage.
- ## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage

## Guardrails
